auth.label: API Key
auth.description: BigDataCloud API key passed with the key query parameter. Create your account and get a key here: https://www.bigdatacloud.com/docs/getting-started

actions.name: get_country_by_ip
actions.description: Get country-level BigDataCloud geolocation data for an IP address.

ip.description: Optional IPv4 or IPv6 address to query. If omitted, BigDataCloud uses the connector server IP.

localityLanguage.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language code used to localize locality names, or `default` for the first administrative language.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for BigDataCloud country lookup by IP address.

localityLanguageRequested.description: The locality language that BigDataCloud applied to this response.

isReachableGlobally.description: Whether the IP address is globally routable on the public Internet.

countryFlagEmoji.description: The Unicode flag emoji for the country.

country.description: The country details returned for the IP address.

lastUpdated.description: The UTC timestamp when BigDataCloud last updated this IP.

outputSchema.description: Country-level geolocation payload returned by BigDataCloud.

actions.name: get_network_by_ip
actions.description: Get BigDataCloud network and ASN details for an IP address.

ip.description: Optional IPv4 or IPv6 address to query. If omitted, BigDataCloud uses the connector server IP.

localityLanguage.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language code used to localize locality names, or `default` for the first administrative language.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for BigDataCloud network lookup by IP address.

registry.description: The regional internet registry that manages the network block.

registryStatus.description: The allocation status of the network block.

registeredCountry.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code registered for the network.

registeredCountryName.description: The localized country name registered for the network.

organisation.description: The organization that the network block is registered to.

isReachableGlobally.description: Whether the network is reachable on the public Internet.

isBogon.description: Whether the IP belongs to a bogon range announced on the global table.

bgpPrefix.description: The detected BGP prefix for the network.

asn.description: The autonomous system number in prefixed string form.

asnNumeric.description: The autonomous system number as an integer.

organisation.description: The organization registered for the autonomous system.

name.description: The short network name of the autonomous system.

rank.description: The global rank of the autonomous system.

items.description: One autonomous system entry returned by BigDataCloud.

carriers.description: The autonomous systems announcing the network.

outputSchema.description: Network intelligence payload returned by BigDataCloud.

actions.name: get_timezone_by_ip
actions.description: Get BigDataCloud timezone data for an IP address.

ip.description: Optional IPv4 or IPv6 address to query. If omitted, BigDataCloud uses the connector server IP.

utcReference.description: Optional Unix time reference in seconds used to evaluate timezone and DST state.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for BigDataCloud timezone lookup by IP address.

effectiveTimeZoneFull.description: The full timezone name adjusted for daylight saving time.

effectiveTimeZoneShort.description: The abbreviated timezone name adjusted for daylight saving time.

utcOffsetSeconds.description: The timezone offset from UTC in seconds.

utcOffset.description: The timezone offset from UTC as a string.

isDaylightSavingTime.description: Whether daylight saving time is currently in effect.

localTime.description: The local time in ISO 8601 format.

utcTime.description: The UTC time in ISO 8601 format when a valid UTC reference is supplied.

actions.name: reverse_geocode_with_timezone
actions.description: Reverse geocode coordinates and return timezone data from BigDataCloud.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate in WGS84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate in WGS84 decimal degrees.

localityLanguage.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language code used to localize locality names, or `default` for the first administrative language.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for BigDataCloud reverse geocoding with timezone.

localityLanguageRequested.description: The locality language that BigDataCloud applied to this response.

city.description: The most significant populated place for the coordinates.

locality.description: The most granular named locality for the coordinates.

postcode.description: The postcode for the coordinates when available.

plusCode.description: The Open Location Code for the coordinates.

localityInfo.description: The locality hierarchy returned by BigDataCloud.

effectiveTimeZoneFull.description: The full timezone name adjusted for daylight saving time.

effectiveTimeZoneShort.description: The abbreviated timezone name adjusted for daylight saving time.

utcOffsetSeconds.description: The timezone offset from UTC in seconds.

utcOffset.description: The timezone offset from UTC as a string.

isDaylightSavingTime.description: Whether daylight saving time is currently in effect.

localTime.description: The local time in ISO 8601 format.

utcTime.description: The UTC time in ISO 8601 format when a valid UTC reference is supplied.

timeZone.description: The timezone object returned for the coordinates.

outputSchema.description: Reverse geocoding payload with embedded timezone returned by BigDataCloud.
